name: Cherry Cheese Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a 13x9 pan with butter-flavored Crisco and set aside.
3. Coarsely chop 1/2 cup of walnuts for the topping.
4. Finely chop the remaining 1/2 cup of walnuts.
5. In a bowl, combine flour and brown sugar. Cut in shortening until fine crumbs form.
6. Add finely chopped walnuts and coconut to the mixture. Mix well.
7. Remove 1/2 cup of the reserved crumbs and set aside.
8. Press the remaining crumbs into the bottom of the prepared pan.
9. Bake for 12-15 minutes, or until edges are lightly browned.
10. In a small bowl, beat cream cheese, sugar, eggs, and vanilla until smooth.
11. Spread the mixture over the hot baked crust.
12. Return to oven and bake for an additional 15 minutes.
13. Spread cherry pie filling over the cheese layer.
14. Sprinkle the reserved coarsely chopped nuts and crumbs evenly over the cherries.
15. Return to oven and bake for another 15 minutes.
16. Cool, then refrigerate several hours before cutting into bars.
